sky.premier.uk.title: Transfer 360: Jimmy F Hasselbaink
sky.premier.uk.description: Find out the inside story of Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink's move to Chelsea. Hear why Hasselbaink had to leave Leeds and exactly how he ended up moving to Stamford Bridge.

sky.premier.uk.title: Transfer 360: Sol Campbell
sky.premier.uk.description: Find out the inside story of Sol Campbell's move from Spurs to Arsenal, as David Dein, Lord Sugar and Campbell detail how one of the Premier League's most controversial transfers unfolded.

sky.premier.uk.title: FNF: Wolves v Aston Villa Hlts
sky.premier.uk.description: Friday Night Football comes from Molineux as bottom club Wolves entertain Aston Villa in a Midlands derby. Unai Emery's Villa remain third in the hunt for a top-four finish. (27.02)

sky.premier.uk.title: New: Saturday Social - Live
sky.premier.uk.description: A fresh take on the beautiful game. Hear about football's hot topics on social media and look at footballers' lives off the pitch, with YouTubers, influencers and more giving their take.

sky.premier.uk.title: PL One on One: Mikel Arteta
sky.premier.uk.description: Contrasting his experiences with those currently at Arsenal, Mikel Arteta reflects on his time as a 16-year-old at Barcelona, revealing how senior players took him under their wing.

sky.premier.uk.title: PL One on One: Dan Burn
sky.premier.uk.description: Dan Burn discusses his career path which saw him play in the non-league, working his way up to the Premier League and now the England national team.

sky.premier.uk.title: PL Stories: Iliman Ndiaye
sky.premier.uk.description: Fresh from lifting the Africa Cup of Nations trophy with Senegal, Everton star Iliman Ndiaye reflects on a journey defined by resilience, imagination and quiet determination.

sky.premier.uk.title: Gillette Soccer Saturday: Build-Up
sky.premier.uk.description: Follow the pre-match build up with the Soccer Saturday panel to an afternoon of football up and down the country, with breaking news, analysis and discussion.

sky.premier.uk.title: Gillette Soccer Sat: Live Scores
sky.premier.uk.description: Stay up to speed with the afternoon's football up and down the country as goals go in and updates arrive in the studio from around the grounds.

sky.premier.uk.title: Live SNF: Leeds Utd v Man City
sky.premier.uk.description: Manchester City head to Leeds on Saturday Night Football with a five-point gap to close to leaders Arsenal. The hosts are unbeaten in their last three Premier League contests.

sky.premier.uk.title: Game Of The Day
sky.premier.uk.description: Enjoy a full 90-minute rerun of one of the Saturday afternoon fixtures in the Premier League.

sky.premier.uk.title: PL: Newcastle v Everton Hlts
sky.premier.uk.description: Newcastle and Everton, both coming from Premier League defeat at the hands of Manchester opposition, enter this St James' Park contest separated by just one point. (28.02)

sky.premier.uk.title: PL: Liverpool v West Ham Hlts

sky.f1.uk.title: Italian F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Monza. Max Verstappen holds pole from title contenders Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri as Charles Leclerc leads the Ferrari charge with Lewis Hamilton down in P10. (07.09)

sky.f1.uk.title: Azerbaijan F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: In Baku, Max Verstappen leads a mixed-up starting grid with Carlos Sainz and Liam Lawson in podium contention. Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri bid to come through the field. (21.09)

sky.f1.uk.title: Singapore F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Marina Bay Circuit for the 2025 Singapore Grand Prix. George Russell claims Mercedes' second pole of the season, with Max Verstappen starting in second. (05.10)

sky.f1.uk.title: US F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out for the United States Grand Prix. A growing threat in the title fight, Max Verstappen has pole from Lando Norris as championship leader Oscar Piastri starts in P6. (19.10)

sky.f1.uk.title: Mexico City F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out in Mexico City. Lando Norris aims to capitalise on a big opening in the title race as the Ferraris of Charles Leclerc and Lewis Hamilton round out the top three. (26.10)

sky.f1.uk.title: Sao Paulo F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Interlagos. An opportunity presents itself to poleman Lando Norris in the title chase with Oscar Piastri starting P4 and Max Verstappen way down the grid. (09.11)

sky.f1.uk.title: Las Vegas F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: As the lights go out on the Strip for the Las Vegas Grand Prix, championship leader Lando Norris starts from P1 with Max Verstappen behind. Oscar Piastri lines up in fifth place. (23.11)

sky.f1.uk.title: Qatar F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out in Qatar. As Lando Norris lines up in P2 a win away from the world championship, it's down to polesitter Oscar Piastri and Max Verstappen to deny the Brit the title. (30.11)

sky.f1.uk.title: Abu Dhabi F1 GP Highlights

sky.mix.uk.title: Elise Christie: No Filter
sky.mix.uk.description: In December 2021, three-time Olympian Elise Christie retired from short track speed skating, broken and unwell. Elise tells her story in this Sky Sports New Focus Fund documentary.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Arsenal/Hull '08
sky.mix.uk.description: Hull: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. Here, for Hull City, the famous 2-1 away win at Arsenal back in September 2008.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest:Birmingham/A Villa '02
sky.mix.uk.description: Birmingham: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. Here, for Birmingham City, the 3-0 win over rivals Aston Villa in 2002.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest: Bradford/L'Pool 2000
sky.mix.uk.description: Bradford: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 49 clubs, as voted for by fans. Here, for Bradford City, their 1-0 win over Liverpool at Valley Parade in May 2000.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest:A Villa/Birmingham '08
sky.mix.uk.description: Aston Villa: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 49 clubs, as voted for by fans. For Aston Villa, the 5-1 hammering of rivals Birmingham City back in April 2008.

sky.mix.uk.title: Austrian F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: Lando Norris bounces back to take pole alongside Charles Leclerc. Oscar Piastri and Lewis Hamilton share row two, while Max Verstappen starts down in P7 for Red Bull's home race. (29.06)

sky.mix.uk.title: British F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's lights out at Silverstone. Max Verstappen shares the front row with Oscar Piastri, while Brits Lando Norris, George Russell and Lewis Hamilton round out the top five. (06.07)

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 14/15: Wolves v Leeds Utd
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive some classic action from the EFL. Here, Wolverhampton Wanderers host Leeds United at Molineux in April 2015 in a thrilling game that saw seven goals.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 14/15: Swindon v Sheff Utd
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic match from the English Football League. Here, Swindon Town host Sheffield United at the County Ground in a 10-goal thriller in the play-offs back in May 2015.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 14/15: Norwich v Ipswich
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, East Anglian rivals Norwich City and Ipswich Town meet at Carrow Road in the Sky Bet play-offs in May 2015.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 14/15: Derby County v Leeds
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive some classic action from the EFL. Here, Derby County take on Leeds United at Pride Park in August 2015 in a game that saw a thrilling late winner.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: Adding the Doha title to her successful Australian Open defence, Victoria Azarenka kept Serena Williams at bay as the top two seeds served up a memorable final in 2013.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: A 36-year-old Novak Djokovic rolled back the years in a three-set classic against world number one Carlos Alcaraz to claim the Cincinnati title - his 39th ATP Masters 1000 crown.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 15/16: Hull City v Reading
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive some classic action from the EFL. Here, Hull City take on Reading at the KC Stadium in December 2015 in a thrilling clash that saw a late winner.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 15/16: QPR v Middlesbrough
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, QPR host Middlesbrough in a five-goal thriller at Loftus Road in the 2015-16 season.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 15/16: B'ham v Middlesbrough
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, Birmingham City take on Middlesbrough at St Andrew's in a four-goal thriller in the 2015-16 season.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 15/16:Middlesbrough v Brighton
sky.mix.uk.description: A look back at some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Middlesbrough take on Brighton and Hove Albion in a tense Championship promotion decider in May 2016.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Darts: Glasgow
sky.mix.uk.description: The BetMGM Premier League visits Glasgow for night three of the season as Luke Humphries plays Josh Rock, while on Scottish soil, Welshman Gerwyn Price and Jonny Clayton collide.

sky.mix.uk.title: Darts Gold: Priestley v Deller
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive some classic darts action. Dennis Priestley meets Keith Deller here in the opening round of the 2001 PDC World Darts Championship.

sky.mix.uk.title: PDC Classics 2023
sky.mix.uk.description: The World Championship final from 2009 when Phil Taylor met Van Barneveld. The Power was targeting a 14th title, while Barney sought revenge for his 2007 defeat. Contains flashing images.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: A US Open finalist one month prior, Caroline Wozniacki's 2014 WTA Finals campaign got underway against then world number two Maria Sharapova in Singapore.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: The China Open climax sees Jannik Sinner and Carlos Alcaraz get set for a second final meeting. Sinner aims to defend the crown, while Alcaraz looks to avenge last year's defeat.

sky.mix.uk.title: PGA Tour Golf Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: The concluding day of the PGA Tour's Genesis Invitational at the Riviera Country Club. Last year, Ryder Cup star Ludvig Åberg claimed victory. (22.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest:Liverpool/Blackburn'95
sky.mix.uk.description: Blackburn: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. For Blackburn Rovers, the 2-1 loss to Liverpool that saw Rovers clinch the title.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest: L'Pool/Blackpool 2010
sky.mix.uk.description: Blackpool: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. Here, for Blackpool, the 2-1 win at Anfield against Liverpool in October 2010.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest: Bolton/Chelsea 2005
sky.mix.uk.description: Chelsea: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for the league's 49 clubs, as voted for by fans. For Chelsea, the win over Bolton in 2005 that won the Blues their first title in 50 years.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Spurs/Arsenal'04
sky.mix.uk.description: Remember a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Arsenal head to White Hart Lane back in 2004, looking to secure the Premier League title.

sky.mix.uk.title: WTA Final: Dubai
sky.mix.uk.description: Meeting for the first time in a final, 31-year-olds Jessica Pegula and Elina Svitolina vie for the Dubai crown. Svitolina bids to end an eight-year wait for her third title here. (21.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: TGL: NYGC v The Bay
sky.mix.uk.description: New York Golf Club go toe to toe with The Bay at the SoFi Center in season two of the TGL.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Final: Rio
sky.mix.uk.description: A men's singles champion is crowned in the final of the 2026 Rio Open on the ATP Tour. (21.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: Belgian F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's lights out at Spa. With eyes on the weather, Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri lock out the front, while Charles Leclerc starts P3. Lewis Hamilton bids to fight through the field. (27.07)

sky.mix.uk.title: Hungarian F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's lights out at the Hungaroring. As Charles Leclerc goes up against the McLarens from pole, both Max Verstappen and Lewis Hamilton face tough recovery drives from further back. (03.08)

sky.mix.uk.title: Elise Christie: No Filter
sky.mix.uk.description: In December 2021, three-time Olympian Elise Christie retired from short track speed skating, broken and unwell. Elise tells her story in this Sky Sports New Focus Fund documentary.

sky.mix.uk.title: Hull KR Renaissance

sky.mix.uk.title: Hull KR Renaissance
sky.mix.uk.description: Memories Are Better Than Dreams: On the verge of ending 40 trophyless years, Hull KR reach Wembley and are set to compete for the game's oldest prize. Contains strong language. (4 of 7)

sky.mix.uk.title: Belgian F1 GP Highlights

Blaze.uk.description: Action Packed Pawn: A ceramic owl made by Pablo Picasso sends Rick cock-a-hoot. Meanwhile, Beatlemania takes over the shop as a Yellow Submarine poster arrives on the counter.

Blaze.uk.title: Swamp People
Blaze.uk.description: Mystery In The Bayou: With them not catching any Gators, Troy and Terral test a radical new strategy, while Jacob's new deckhand tries to prove his worth. (S11, ep 4)

Blaze.uk.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
Blaze.uk.description: Gators and Ghost Towns: As Troy, Chase and Bill mount an airboat to hunt an area where pythons are raiding alligator nests, an unfortunate error could leave them stranded. (S2, ep 4)

Blaze.uk.title: Canadian Pickers
Blaze.uk.description: The Pickers invade Nova Scotia. Scott taunts Sheldon with a lucky tattoo and Keenan messes up at the warehouse. (S3, ep 10)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Two for the Price of Dust: The big guns come out in Riverside, but Rene isn't having any of it. Darrell pushes his luck with a smaller locker and makes a neat profit. (S14, ep 15)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: It's a Safe Time to Get Lit!: Kenny rides a recent string of luck right into his unit, while Rene puts his bankroll up against a pair of safes. (S14, ep 16)

Blaze.uk.title: Junk & Disorderly
Blaze.uk.description: Henry Cole, Allen Millyard and Guy Willison visit top collector Stuart Imber before preparing to sell their latest finds at the Fairford Steam. (S2, ep 6)

Blaze.uk.title: Ancient Aliens
Blaze.uk.description: Giorgio Tsoukalos takes a look back at the most compelling investigations of all, and events that he believes represent real encounters with extraterrestrial visitors.

Blaze.uk.title: Evidence Of The Unexplained
Blaze.uk.description: Thousands of UFO sightings and abductions are reported every year. This series examines these accounts and casts new light on historic cases. (S1, ep 1)

Blaze.uk.title: Pawn Stars
Blaze.uk.description: Jurassic Pawn: Chum gets into the teen spirit when a piece of Kurt Cobain memorabilia finds its way into the shop. Rick takes a swing at a National League Championship ring.

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Children of the Cornbread: Ivy does his utmost to intimidate the other buyers in Lancaster, while Brandi gives in to Bozek and Dusty goes up against the King to prove a point. (S14, ep 13)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Proxy Moxie: Barry uses a little-known tactic to snatch up a locker and it ties him up in knots. Meanwhile, Brandi shops in the bargain basement and Ivy lands a sizeable unit. (S14, ep 14)

Blaze.uk.title: New: Dickinson's Real Deal
Blaze.uk.description: Aylesbury 1: Join David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal, or will they take a chance at auction instead? (S10, ep 75)

Blaze.uk.title: New: Road Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Amped Up in Tampa: Motorcyclists fight with an angry driver and find themselves staring down the barrel of a gun and a semi-truck is no match for high-speed winds from a tornado. (S1, ep 3)

Blaze.uk.title: New: Road Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Burning Down the Rv: A driver and a motorcyclist in Florida play a dangerous game of cat and mouse and a couple in Canada plummet their truck into an icy lake. (S1, ep 4)

Blaze.uk.title: Paranormal: Caught On Camera
Blaze.uk.description: Two hikers take refuge from a storm in a haunted hut in Scotland and a California man's canine companion calls out from the other side. (S8, ep 9)

Blaze.uk.title: Paranormal: Caught On Camera
Blaze.uk.description: Investigators explore a haunted, violent Tennessee prison, a piano-playing ghost appears in a NY rental and a mysterious figure is caught near a Mexican coal mine. (S8, ep 10)

Blaze.uk.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
Blaze.uk.description: Haunted Calling: Hear the stories of ghost hunters, as they share their personal experiences from the past that put them on the path to a paranormal profession. (S1, ep 2)

Blaze.uk.title: Close Encounters
Blaze.uk.description: In Nova Scotia, a former naval officer sees five bright lights in the skies and a cigar-shaped object behind them. (S12, ep 13)

Blaze.uk.title: Close Encounters
Blaze.uk.description: Strange light patterns are seen in Texas. In France, a man's knee injury is suddenly healed after an odd encounter. (S2, ep 14)

Blaze.uk.title: Ancient Aliens

Blaze.uk.title: Hardcore Pawn
Blaze.uk.description: Unforgiven: Rich makes a glaring error that could see him fired. Plus, a kooky cowboy arrives at the counter and Ashley reacts to bad manners in the pawn shop queue. (S8, ep 3)

Blaze.uk.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
Blaze.uk.description: Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal or take a chance at auction instead? (S9, ep 20)

Blaze.uk.title: UFO Files
Blaze.uk.description: Hangar 18: UFO Warehouse: Experts claim that UFO wreckage is stored in a top-secret facility in Ohio. Former employees spin a tale of alien bodies and flying saucer debris. (S1, ep 20)

Blaze.uk.title: UFO Files
Blaze.uk.description: Alien Encounters: An examination of what ufology calls 'trace cases', where physical material from an encounter is analysed to determine if it is evidence of an alien contact. (S1, ep 21)

Blaze.uk.title: UFO Files
Blaze.uk.description: Sightings of the 70s: Accounts from a number of UFO sightings that took place in the 1970s, including the most famous of all intergalactic crashes: Roswell. (S1, ep 22)

Blaze.uk.title: UFO Files
Blaze.uk.description: Alien Engineering (Part 1 of 2): What would happen if a UFO did land on Earth and humans found it? Engineers create a 'spaceship' to see how alien technology could work. (S1, ep 14)

Blaze.uk.title: UFO Files
Blaze.uk.description: Alien Engineering (Part 2 of 2): Laser weapons and tele-transporters would probably all be fitted to an alien spaceship, but what if they could be used by humans too? (S1, ep 15)

Blaze.uk.title: Alien Disclosure Files
Blaze.uk.description: What Lies Below: UAPs have been seen entering the ocean at high speeds - and since our oceans can be as deep as six miles, were the UAPs simply trying to get home? (S1, ep 9)

Blaze.uk.title: Alien Disclosure Files
Blaze.uk.description: The Paradox: As the Fermi Paradox states, the likelihood of advanced life in the universe is surprisingly high - so why haven't we had any contact with extraterrestrial life? (S1, ep 10)

Blaze.uk.title: UFO POV
Blaze.uk.description: Langenburg: Expert Chris Rutkowski, home to the largest UFO research archive, sets the scene and explains an unexplained event. (S1, ep 7)

Blaze.uk.title: Encounter: UFO
Blaze.uk.description: Sometimes, the mysterious unidentified objects people see in the sky touch down and leave physical evidence behind. (S1, ep 6)

Blaze.uk.title: The Proof Is Out There
Blaze.uk.description: Crocodile Monster, Tiktok USO, and Ghost Dog Collar Removal: The team investigate a legendary man-eating croc, glowing lights in Mexico and chilling footage of a pair of dogs. (S3, ep 10)

Blaze.uk.title: The Proof Is Out There
Blaze.uk.description: Congressional UFOs, New Nessie and Zombie Fish: Dive into a video from the US Navy that proves once and for all that UFOs exist and examine an alleged Loch Ness monster sighting. (S3, ep 1)

Blaze.uk.title: What On Earth?
Blaze.uk.description: Check out America's 1500 feet tall atomic tower, uncover the lost village of the damned and embark on a hunt for dinosaur fossils... from outer space? (S5, ep 20)

Blaze.uk.title: What On Earth?
Blaze.uk.description: World's Deadliest Threats: Mysterious satellite images reveal China's hidden terror camps and provide access to America's top secret apocalypse pyramid. (S6, ep 1)

Blaze.uk.title: What On Earth?
Blaze.uk.description: Monsters of Diamond Desert: Satellites capture unusual images including markings in the desert, while a strange symbol could be a portal into a lost South American civilisation. (S6, ep 2)

Blaze.uk.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
Blaze.uk.description: The Loch Ness Monster: Despite centuries of sightings, the most infamous deep-sea monster remains unidentified. Does the Loch Ness Monster exist and, if so, what could it be? (S4, ep 1)

Blaze.uk.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
Blaze.uk.description: The Assassination of JFK: In 1963, President John F Kennedy is assassinated. A suspect is captured but investigators and amateur sleuths still investigate alternative theories. (S4, ep 3)

Blaze.uk.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
Blaze.uk.description: The Lost Colony of Roanoke: In 1587, settlers land on Roanoke Island to establish the first English colony in America, but vanish without a trace and leave only cryptic clues. (S4, ep 4)

Blaze.uk.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid
Blaze.uk.description: An Eye for a Eye: From strict, brutal codes of Hammurabi, to the secretly malevolent evil eye. History is full of remarkable stories of acts committed in the name of revenge. (S2, ep 3)

Blaze.uk.title: New: Clash Of Ancient Warriors
Blaze.uk.description: The Catalaunian Plains: Attila, king of the Huns, faces strongman of the Roman Empire, Generalissimo Aetius. But their terrible battle ends in a bloodbath, with no clear victory. (S2, ep 5)

Blaze.uk.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner
Blaze.uk.description: Evil Places: From dark forests to haunted houses, explore the places where bad things repeatedly and inexplicably happen. (S1, ep 1)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Stan & Gran
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Cove beach is covered in a swarm of starfish! But everything is not as it seems! Why have they only got four arms, and why are they plastic? (S1 Ep20)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: PAW Patrol
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: ...Runaway Truck. When Boomer's monster truck stunt goes wrong, he's left dangling helplessly from a drawbridge. It's up to the Rescue Wheels to save Boomer. (S11 Ep4)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Milo
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Milo, Lofty and Lark are given the responsibility of becoming judges while Judge Jackson is called away to referee a football match. (S1 Ep23)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: The Wise Old Elf teaches the children how to tell the time, and takes Ben and Holly to see the big clock at the top of the Elf Tree. (S1 Ep20)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Daddy Pig is left behind when everyone takes Grampy Rabbit's little boat to the riverside picnic spot. (S4 Ep33)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Odo
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Odo and Doodle catch a brief glimpse of a blue bird and go on a quest to find a bird that they think will look just like Doodle. (S2 Ep35)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Come & Play with Pip and Posy
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Seeing Pip and Posy paint together gets Kemi's imagination going! She and the Milkshakers do their best describing pictures for a partner to draw. (Ep6)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Milkshake! Story Den
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Join Derek for a story in which Pip and Posy help Jamila build a bug hotel. Will Pip and Posy learn to remain calm and quiet to avoid scaring away the little hotel visitors? (S3 Ep14)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Jeremy Vine
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Storm & Alexis
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: National and international news.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Matt Allwright
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Vanessa
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Good Ship Murder Christmas Special
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: A festive episode of the cruising murder mystery hit. Jack tries to rekindle Kate's spirit, but murder throws a spanner in the works. Can they catch Santa's killer?

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Rocking Johnny sets out to raise money for flood victims in Valencia, challenging himself to write, record and perform a new song in front of 200 people at a charity gig. (S14 Ep67)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: 5 News at 5
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Love Nature
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: The Devon Wildlife Trust and other partners are reintroducing pine martens into Dartmoor and Exmoor. As predators they balance the other animals and the ecosystem. (S1 Ep16)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Motorway
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: There's mayhem when motorway patrollers discover a car on fire and leaking fuel. A broken-down van blocks a slip road, and a four-vehicle pile-up causes chaos on Spaghetti Junction. (S4 Ep6)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Celebrity Puzzling
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Jeremy Vine hosts, alongside team captains Sally Lindsay and Carol Vorderman, who are joined by comedians Darren Harriott and Lucy Porter to tackle more fiendish puzzles. (S2 Ep5)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: In Africa, intrepid naturalist Steve Backshall goes in search of the only wild animal that fills him with fear and known for their lethal aggression - the hippo. (Ep1/2)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Wonders of the Moon with Dara O Briain
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Exploring the ways in which the moon shapes just about everything around us, and why there's now a new race to get humans back to the surface of our satellite. (Ep1/2)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Wonders of the Moon with Dara O Briain
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Dara tells the story of how the first photograph of the far side of the moon left scientists baffled. And he tries a virtual reality headset to walk on the 'moon'. (Ep2/2)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Piers Morgan Uncensored:...
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: ...Is This The End Of The Monarchy? The bold, opinion-led news and debate show hosted by Piers Morgan. Piers blends journalism, debates and cultural commentary that's unapologetically direct. (S2 Ep6)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit

Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Alex Polizzi: My Hotel Nightmare

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Rich House, Poor House

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: **Visually Signed** Ben...

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: ...World. Peppa and George wake up one morning to find that all the rain has made a flood, and their house is now a desert island! (S3 Ep52)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Mummy and Daddy Pig take Peppa and George to a castle to feast on medieval banquets, play King and Queen and meet a dragon. It's George's favourite day ever! (S5 Ep1)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Mishap follows mishap as everyone pays a visit to snooty King and Queen Marigold's castle. (S1 Ep48)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go!
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Thomas and Percy laugh at each other over embarrassing moments, which causes them to get into a fight that could destroy their friendship forever.

Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Peppa and her friends go to school early to have breakfast together. (S6 Ep29)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Adventures of Paddington
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: When Mateo and Judy form a secret club in the treehouse, they won't let Jonathan and Paddington join without a password, so Paddington must discover the secret codeword. (S1 Ep40)

Channel5Plus1.uk.description: In Tuscany, Ben meets British couple George and Sophie who have breathed new life into a farmhouse. George's desire to live self-sufficiently lead to a lifelong project. (S17 Ep5)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Ben spends time with 'Pirate' Rob, who lives for half the year with his 18-year-old son Damien in a sandbag house on an island in the middle of an industrial river in Oregon. (S17 Ep6)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: In the USA, Ben meets a woman on a perpetual walk across the country, uncovering what first set her on this never-ending path and the harsh realities of her travels. (S21 Ep6)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Master dog trainer Graeme Hall provides canine training. Identical twins Christine and Jackie have their relationship tested when they buy dogs who do not see eye-to-eye. (S3 Ep 6)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Luna the Labrador has a split personality. On the one hand, she's the perfect family pet, but as soon as there's food around, she loses it. (S3 Ep 7)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Catching Up with the...
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: ...Royals with Rev Richard Coles & Emily Andrews. After the fall out of Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor's arrest, the duo ask whether the late Queen was too soft on her 'favourite son'. (S1 Ep5)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Yorkshire Vet
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Series following the town and country vets at four practices. Peter and Shona have some donkey work to do at the Greens' farm. Matt rushes to a local farm to try to save a ewe. (S16 Ep1)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: In this week's episode, as November arrives the Owen family try their hand at self-sufficiency with their very first dairy cow. (S4 Ep 6)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: With the local mountain rescue team using the farm as a base for their annual training exercise, Clive and Amanda volunteer their children to take part. (S4 Ep4)

Channel5Plus1.uk.description: National and international news.

E4Plus1.uk.description: (2015) Sci-fi thriller with Arnold Schwarzenegger and Emilia Clarke. Part five of the franchise follows Sarah Connor in an alternate timeline to the previous movies, as she takes on Skynet.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Naked Attraction's Best Naughty...
E4Plus1.uk.description: ...Bits: We celebrate our celibate daters and the pickers who entered the studio with their virginity very much intact, ready for a televisual awakening like no other.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Naked Attraction's Best Naughty...
E4Plus1.uk.description: ...Bits: We celebrate Naked Attraction's biggest and best audacious, attention-grabbing characters, from 75-year-old bisexual Ian to Shaida, who was looking for the dad of her future kids.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Goggleboxers watch Strictly, Corrie, Antiques Roadshow, Frozen Planet II, Kings of Pain, Help! My House Is Haunted, and ITV News on Kwasi Kwarteng's disastrous mini-budget. (S20 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: First Dates
E4Plus1.uk.description: Has 'ladies' man' Terry met his match with bisexual Larisha? And will Canadian Donato's transatlantic charms impress Londoner Kate? (S1 Ep6/6)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Naked Attraction's Best Naughty...
E4Plus1.uk.description: ...Bits: We celebrate our celibate daters and the pickers who entered the studio with their virginity very much intact, ready for a televisual awakening like no other.

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Big Orange: Beverly and Lainey hatch a plan to destroy Barry's favourite shirt. Adam's distraught when Murray decides to tear down the family tree house. (S3 Ep23)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Christmas...
E4Plus1.uk.description: ...in the Snow: Laid-back Liam plans to wow his bride with a wintry white wedding. But 2000 miles away in Portugal, bride-to-be Georgia is dreaming of sun, sand and sangria.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
E4Plus1.uk.description: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister Rude(ish) Tube, featuring school, a spelling bee and ninjas.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Lego Masters Australia
E4Plus1.uk.description: Explosions in Motion: The teams build a Hollywood movie scene that will set off explosives in ultra-slow motion to create the ultimate action-packed moment. (S5 Ep9) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride
E4Plus1.uk.description: The One with the Wight Wedding: Groom Liam wants a wedding day that celebrates his homeland, the Isle of Wight. Bride Kandi wants a more standard day. Will it be all-white or go all wrong?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride
E4Plus1.uk.description: The One in the Spanish Sea: Carl aims to marry Rebecca on the Med but she has expectations for a high-class affair. Will Carl's plans make a splash and make Rebecca swoon with delight?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Moon Landing: Claire feels slightly inadequate when her old friend, Valerie (guest star Minnie Driver), visits and is nothing like Claire remembered. (S1 Ep14)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: My Funky Valentine: Phil and Claire break from their traditional Valentine's Day dinner date and plan a little role play excursion. And Jay and Gloria's ideas of romance clash. (S1 Ep15)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Fears: When Phil and Luke embark on a discovery expedition underneath the house, Phil tries not to let his fear of the dark and of creepy crawlies get the best of him. (S1 Ep16)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Gordon Returns: Gordon Ramsay revisits some of the restaurants he set out to save, including The Mixing Bowl, The Olde Stone Mill, Peter's and Campania. Have things improved? (S2 Ep13)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Spanish Pavillion: Gordon Ramsay visits Spanish Pavillion, a family-run restaurant whose owners, brothers Michael and Jerry, spend more time struggling for power than working. (S4 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Classic American: Best pals Colleen and Naomi bought Classic American in New York together, but their inexperience is pushing their friendship to the edge. Can Gordon help? (S4 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Down City: Gordon Ramsay tries to save struggling restaurant Down City in Providence, Rhode Island. But tough-talking owner Abby refuses to take advice from anyone. (S4 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Home Alone 3
E4Plus1.uk.description: (1997) Comedy sequel starring Alex D. Linz as a resourceful boy who's stranded at home with chickenpox when a top-secret military microchip comes his way. Can he keep it safe from crooks?

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Homer the Vigilante: Homer sets up a chaotic vigilante group to combat one-man crime spree Molloy (guest star Sam Neill). (S5 Ep11/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Bart Gets Famous: Thanks to his new catchphrase, 'I didn't do it', Bart becomes famous, getting his own TV series and releasing a range of merchandise. (S5 Ep12/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Homer and Apu: When Apu loses the Kwik-E-Mart, he moves in with the Simpsons. And then Homer joins him on a pilgrimage to the first ever Kwik-E-Mart, in the Himalayas. (S5 Ep13/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Lisa vs. Malibu Stacey: Lisa decides Malibu Stacey dolls set a bad example to girls, so she pleads with their creator, Stacy Lovell (Kathleen Turner), to design an alternative. (S5 Ep14/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Much Apu About Something: Apu loses his job when his shop is rebranded as a health food market aimed at a hip young crowd. Bart's latest prank has terrible consequences. (S27 Ep12/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Love Is in the N2-O2-Ar-CO2-Ne-He-CH4: Professor Frink uses science to turn into a ladies' man. And medication makes Grampa and the Retirement Castle residents hallucinate. (S27 Ep13/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Gal of Constant Sorrow: Bart and Lisa get to know a homeless folk singer. Homer's attempt at DIY traps the cat in the walls of the house, so he launches a rescue bid. (S27 Ep14/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Lisa the Veterinarian: Lisa is inspired to become a vet and begins an internship at a local surgery. Marge gets a job as a crime scene cleaner but finds it traumatic. (S27 Ep15/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Marge-ian Chronicles: When Lisa signs up to participate in the future colonisation of Mars, Marge's attempt to use reverse psychology to discourage her goes badly wrong. (S27 Ep16/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: Celebs including Danny Dyer, Chris Packham and Jennifer Saunders have been watching The Nevermets, Insomnia, MILF Manor, In with a Shout, Canal Boat Diaries and BBC News (Trump). (S6 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: What do Britain's favourite telly watchers think of Strictly Come Dancing, Educating Yorkshire, The Girlfriend, Dragons' Den, Below Deck and Only Connect? (S26 Ep5)

Film4.uk.title: Ambulance
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Michael Bay's high-octane thriller with Jake Gyllenhaal. After a bodged heist, two brothers try to evade the LAPD in an ambulance, while a paramedic operates on a cop in the back.

Film4.uk.title: Boss Level
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Groundhog day shoot 'em up with Frank Grillo, Naomi Watts and Mel Gibson. Ray gets killed every day. Can he escape by unravelling the mystery of why a bunch of people want him dead?

Film4.uk.title: Proxima
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Sci-fi drama starring Eva Green as an astronaut who gets the mission she's always dreamed of, but faces a tug-of-love between her personal and professional life.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Arizona Raiders
Film4.uk.description: (1965) William Whitney's brutal western. Two former Confederate rebels are offered their freedom if they can track, catch or even kill their former gang mates. Starring Audie Murphy.

Film4.uk.title: Leave Her to Heaven
Film4.uk.description: (1945) Riveting film noir melodrama starring Oscar-nominated Gene Tierney as an irredeemably evil, possessive woman who resorts to murder to keep her husband (Cornel Wilde) with her.

Film4.uk.title: The Son of Robin Hood
Film4.uk.description: (1958) Swashbuckling adventure starring June Laverick. Robin Hood is dead and his band of followers seek a worthy new leader. And they get one who exceeds all their expectations.

Film4.uk.title: The Lost World
Film4.uk.description: (1960) Fantasy adventure. Claude Rains plays a scientist who, convinced that dinosaurs still roam the earth, sets off into the Amazon to find them. Based on Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's novel.

Film4.uk.title: Independence Day: Resurgence
Film4.uk.description: (2016) Sci-fi blockbuster sequel starring Jeff Goldblum and Liam Hemsworth. Twenty years after Earth repelled a devastating alien invasion, the extraterrestrials return to finish the job.

Film4.uk.title: Django Unchained Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Director Quentin Tarantino and stars Samuel L Jackson, Christoph Waltz, Jamie Foxx and Kerry Washington talk about making the western adventure set against a backdrop of slavery.

Film4.uk.title: Django Unchained
Film4.uk.description: (2012) Quentin Tarantino's darkly comic, award-laden western with Jamie Foxx, Christopher Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio and Samuel L Jackson. A freed slave searches for his wife... and revenge.

Film4.uk.title: The Kid Detective
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Dark Adam Brody comedy. Abe was a childhood detecting prodigy but is now a failing PI. But when a local boy is killed Abe gets the case. Things are looking up (for Abe, not the boy).

Film4.uk.title: Thief
Film4.uk.description: (1971) Crime thriller starring Richard Crenna. A recently paroled thief must do one last job to pay off old debts. But can he get away with it and build a life with his new girlfriend?

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Patton
Film4.uk.description: (1970) Multi-Oscar-winning, fact-based, Second World War drama starring George C Scott, who gives a vivid portrait of the famously straight-talking US commander General George Patton.

Film4.uk.title: Ride Lonesome
Film4.uk.description: (1959) Western. Randolph Scott plays a bounty hunter who has unfinished business with the brother of his latest target. But his quest for revenge looks like it could be undermined.

Film4.uk.title: Bridge of Spies Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Director Steven Spielberg and stars Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance talk about making their Cold War espionage drama.

Film4.uk.title: Twelve O'Clock High
Film4.uk.description: (1949) World War II drama starring Gregory Peck as a US general who must treat a demoralised bomber squadron severely to restore discipline. With Oscar-winning support from Dean Jagger.

Film4.uk.title: Mrs Doubtfire
Film4.uk.description: (1993) Comedy starring Robin Williams and Sally Field. A struggling actor dresses as a woman to get his estranged wife to hire him as a housekeeper, so he can spend more time with his kids.

Film4.uk.title: The Creator
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Sci-fi extravaganza starring John David Washington. An undercover operative must destroy a superweapon in a war against AI. But the superweapon looks like a little girl.

Film4.uk.title: The Witch: Part 2 - The Other One
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Park Hoon-jung's blood-soaked sci-fi horror sequel starring Shin Si-ah as a super-powered lab experiment let loose on the world to terminate with extreme prejudice and some gusto.

Film4.uk.title: Lola
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Lo-fi sci-fi. In 1940, two sisters invent a contraption that intercepts future broadcasts. But it inadvertently creates an alternate timeline in which the Nazis win the war. Oops.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: The Call of the Wild
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Touching adventure with Harrison Ford, based on Jack London's classic novel. A big, friendly hound finds himself unwittingly travelling across late 19th-century North America.

Film4.uk.title: Monkey Business
Film4.uk.description: (1952) Screwball comedy starring Cary Grant as a scientist who drinks the elixir of youth and starts acting the fool, as does his strait-laced wife (Ginger Rogers).

Film4.uk.title: Secret Headquarters
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Family comedy with Michael Peña. A young lad discovers that his slacker dad is a superhero. And before he's got used to the idea, he must foil a villain's plot to bring his dad down.

Film4.uk.title: Taxi
Film4.uk.description: (2004) All-action thriller. Queen Latifah stars as the driver of the fastest taxi in New York, who teams up with an inept cop (Jimmy Fallon) to catch a team of female bank-robbers.

Film4.uk.title: Bridge of Spies Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Director Steven Spielberg and stars Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance talk about making their Cold War espionage drama.

Film4.uk.title: Dante's Peak
Film4.uk.description: (1997) Action thriller starring Pierce Brosnan and Linda Hamilton. The inhabitants of a volcano-side resort unwisely ignore a scientist's warning about its imminent eruption.

Film4.uk.title: The Equalizer
Film4.uk.description: (2014) Thriller. Denzel Washington stars as an ex-soldier who comes out of retirement to help a teenage sex worker who's been assaulted by her pimp.

Film4.uk.title: The Frighteners
Film4.uk.description: (1996) Peter Jackson's comedy horror stars Michael J Fox as a psychic investigator in a town that has more ghouls and ghosties than you can shake a spirit stick at. But is he a fraud?
